code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  mut best: Int = 0
  mut best_abs: Int = 0
  mut found = false
  for tok in parts
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      let a = abs_int(n)
      if not found
        best = n
        best_abs = a
        found = true
      else if a < best_abs
        best = n
        best_abs = a
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if found
    println("min_abs=#{best}")
    Ok(())
  else
    Err("no integers found")
  end
end
